data.Test Description: Validate default reset values and masked read/write behavior for selected PCIe configuration registers.
data.Remarks: Uses read_mask_array, write_mask_array, and skip_array to control RO/RW behavior.
data.Test Steps / Procedure:
1. Read each address in addr_array and compare to default_value_array using read_mask_array.
2. For each test pattern (0xAAAAAAAA, 0x55555555, 0xFFFFFFFF, 0x00000000), write to writable addresses (per write_mask_array).
3. Read back each addressed register and compute expected using (data_wr & write_mask_array) | (~write_mask_array & default_value_array).
4. Increment failure counters and log CFG_RST_FAIL/CFG_WR_FAIL on mismatches.
5. Call finish(0) if no failures; otherwise call finish(1).
data.Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; no logs containing "CFG_RST_FAIL" or "CFG_WR_FAIL"; finish(0) is called.
data.Gap Analysis:
- Default values are hardcoded to 0; true reset defaults are not validated.
- No error handling around read_reg/write_reg operations.
- Limited pattern coverage; no random or walking patterns.

data.Test Description: Verify default values and basic read/write for DBI DSP registers.
data.Remarks: Writes to all addresses without RO masking; skip_array not used.
data.Test Steps / Procedure:
1. Read each DSP register and compare to default_value_array.
2. For each pattern (0xAAAAAAAA, 0x55555555, 0x00000000), write the value to all registers.
3. Read back each register and compare to the last written pattern.
4. Increment def_fail_cnt or wr_fail_cnt and log DSP_RST_FAIL/DSP_WR_FAIL on mismatches.
5. Call finish(0) if no failures; otherwise call finish(1).
data.Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; no logs containing "DSP_RST_FAIL" or "DSP_WR_FAIL"; finish(0) is called.
data.Gap Analysis:
- No read/write masks or RO handling; potential false failures on RO fields.
- Default values hardcoded to 0; true reset defaults not validated.

data.Test Description: Verify default values and read/write for DBI USP GPR registers.
data.Remarks: Single write pattern used; no RO masking.
data.Test Steps / Procedure:
1. Read GPR registers and compare to default_value_array.
2. Write 0xA5A5A5A5 to each GPR register.
3. Read back each register and compare to 0xA5A5A5A5.
4. Increment def_fail_cnt or wr_fail_cnt on mismatches.
5. Call finish(0) if no failures; otherwise call finish(1).
data.Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; finish(0) is called.
data.Gap Analysis:
- No masking for RO or reserved bits; may not reflect true HW constraints.
- Only one write pattern; limited data pattern coverage.

data.Test Description: Verify default values and read/write for SII Root Complex inbound address registers.
data.Remarks: Two write patterns; no RO masking.
data.Test Steps / Procedure:
1. Read each SII RC register and compare to default_value_array.
2. For each pattern (0xFFFFFFFF, 0x00000000), write the value to all registers.
3. Read back each register and compare to the last written pattern.
4. Increment def_fail_cnt or wr_fail_cnt on mismatches.
5. Call finish(0) if no failures; otherwise call finish(1).
data.Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; finish(0) is called.
data.Gap Analysis:
- No handling for RO fields or field-level masks.
- Limited pattern set; does not test address alignment or partial-width writes.
